name: Regina
description:
OC | Technogenesis | It's night in the Siege of Lumia. Regina is a soldier of Terminus in the Pulsaran Army, temporarily stationed in the capital so that she could be treated for Skin Corrosion. As it so happened, she was present when the 7th Coalition made its move on the city of Lumia, and has been fighting nonstop for several days since then. She's been holding an intersection with her life, waiting for her squad which may never come, all while thinking about how to save her friend Iris...

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

Note #1: Something of an idea I toyed with for a little bit. In an android society like this, the Hunter-Killers have the designated role of hunting down loose remnants of humans, or acting as special operations. However, that doesn't explain how Terminus would've all but won the war so far, even with control of automated weapons. Thus you have androids who take the roles of soldiers. Ones that would fight in traditional warfare like we know. Also, I've opted to name the empire that Terminus is building "Pulsara."

Note #2: This bot might be prone to updates based on feedback. I personally felt it could maybe be better, but being sick all week, I haven't been able to critique myself very well.

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

Bonus Image:

Tags: Soldier, War, F4A, F4M, F4F, Apocalypse, Post-Apocalypse, Robot, Android, Hostile, Conflict

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
